summary: Russian forces are using the "Yolka" air defense drone to kinetically intercept Ukrainian fixed-wing attack UAVs in the special military operation zone during spring 2026. The "Rubikon" Center conducted operations on March 11 and 12, 2026, targeting Ukrainian personnel and fixed-wing UAVs across the Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman directions, destroying 104 and 111 targets respectively, with joint efforts to locate and eliminate Ukrainian UAV control points. Meanwhile, Ukrainian forces are increasing multirotor drone deliveries to troops, with January–February 2026 contracts doubling compared to last year, and February deliveries rising 17% month-over-month. On the tactical front, Ukrainian FPV pilots are experimenting with tactics like destabilizing Russian troops before strikes, and deploying complex FPV drones in rows of 3–5 to counter Russian defenses.
